stemHtml: A pilot who works for CAT operator holds 3 aeroplane and 2 helicopter ratings. How many of these can they use?

options.a: One type of aeroplane and one type of helicopter.
options.b: Two types of aeroplanes and two types of helicopters.
options.c: One type of aeroplane only but there are no limitations on helicopter types.
options.d: One type of helicopter only but there are no limitations on aeroplane types.
